messages.about.basedOn: Based on "Magium" by Cristian Mihailescu / Chris Michael Wilson.
messages.about.changes: Changes: French translation, UI adaptation, technical restructuring, additional interface features.
messages.about.license: Original story/data licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0).
messages.about.title: About
messages.about.translation: French translation and adaptation by Foobar, 2026.
messages.about.unofficial: This is an unofficial adaptation and is not endorsed by the original author's estate or the Magium community maintainers.
messages.abilities.empty: Your abilities will appear here after Barry checks the stat device.
messages.abilities.help: Use + to prepare a point allocation. Use - to cancel a prepared point. Once confirmed, points are spent and cannot be removed from this panel.
messages.abilities.title: Abilities
messages.achievements.title: Achievements
messages.debug.title: Debug
messages.errors.debugBoolean: Debug boolean values must be true or false
messages.errors.debugNumber: Debug numeric values must be finite numbers
messages.errors.choiceUnavailable: Choice is not available from the current state
messages.errors.decompressionUnsupported: This browser does not support runtime content decompression
messages.errors.saveContentVersion: This save belongs to another content version
messages.errors.saveLocalOnly: This backup only restores in the browser that exported it
messages.errors.savePasswordOrCorrupt: Wrong password or damaged save file
messages.errors.savePasswordRequired: Enter the password used when exporting this backup
messages.errors.saveTamper: This save file does not match a playable route
messages.errors.saveDebug: Debug saves stay local to this browser
messages.errors.statUnavailable: This stat is not available for allocation
messages.saves.backupPasswordHelp: Leave it empty for a backup that only restores in this browser.
messages.saves.copy: The game saves after every choice. Named saves let you keep several routes. Export without a password only restores in this browser; add a password for a portable backup you can import in prod or another browser. Import resumes a compatible backup.
messages.saves.debugLocalOnly: This route was changed with Debug and can only stay in local browser saves.
messages.saves.restorePasswordHelp: Use the same password you chose when exporting the backup.
messages.saves.title: Saves
messages.settings.copy: These choices only affect reading comfort. The story and your progress stay the same.
messages.settings.highContrastHelp: Make text and controls stand out more strongly.
messages.settings.illustrationsHelp: Show moment illustrations after the matching scene when they are available.
messages.settings.sceneRevealHelp: Fade in the newest paragraph when a scene opens.
messages.settings.textSizeHelp: Adjust the story text for longer reading sessions.
messages.settings.title: Settings
